**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Unani Medical Colleges for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-Un.(07)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **National Unani Medical College & Hospital, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh (Inst. ID-UNA001)** was visited on **2026-06-02 and 2026-06-03** to assess the available facilities of teaching and practical training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 100 seats in UG (BUMS) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Mohd Aslam | V04120 |
| 2 | Dr. Shabnam Ansari | V04188 |

Further, after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures, the following compliance/shortcomings have been observed against MESAR (UG) Unani 2023:-

**Land:**
1. Minimum requirement of land — Land available is 5 acres against the requirement of 5 acres - fulfilling.

**Constructed Area:**
2. Constructed area of the college — Constructed area of the college is 5100 sq.mt. against the requirement of 5080 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
3. Total constructed area of college and attached teaching hospital — Total constructed area is 9600 sq.mt. against the requirement of 9555 sq.mt. - fulfilling.

**Clinical Skill / Simulation Laboratory:**
4. Clinical Skill or Simulation Laboratory - demonstration cum practice rooms — No. of demonstration cum practice rooms is 2 against the requirement of 2 - fulfilling.

**Central Library:**
5. Central Library - total number of books — Total number of books is 9500 against the requirement of 10000 - not fulfilling.
6. Central Library - indexed scientific journals — No. of indexed scientific journals is 12 against the requirement of 10.
7. Central Library - seating capacity — Sitting capacity is 120 against the requirement of 120.
8. Digital Library - stations with computer systems — No. of digital library stations is 25 against the requirement of 25.
9. Central Library - seating arrangement adequacy — Sitting arrangement - adequate.

**Herbal Garden:**
10. Herbal garden - minimum area — Herbal garden area is 4000 sq.mt. against the requirement of 4000 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
11. Herbal garden - minimum medicinal plant species — No. of medicinal plant species is 200 against the minimum requirement of 200 - fulfilling.

**Biometric Attendance (AEBAS):**
12. Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) — Fulfilling the criteria as per Regulation 9 of MESAR (UG) Unani 2023

**College Website:**
13. College website — Functional

**Hospital Constructed Area:**
14. Constructed area of the hospital — **Constructed area of the hospital is fulfilling the requirement as per Table-2 of MESAR (UG) Unani 2023**

**Hospital Functionality:**
15. Average attendance of patients in OPD per day — Average attendance of patient in OPD per day is 180 against the minimum requirement of 200 - not fulfilling.
16. In-Patient Department - total number of beds — Total number of IPD beds is 100 against the minimum requirement of 100.
17. Medical In-Patient Section beds (55%) — Medical In-Patient Section beds are 55 against the requirement of 55.
18. Surgical In-Patient Section beds (45%) — Surgical In-Patient Section beds are 45 against the requirement of 45.
19. Minimum average bed occupancy — Average bed occupancy is 40 against the minimum requirement of 40.
20. Computerized central registration system — Computerized central registration system is not available.

**Teaching staff:-** Teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Non-teaching staff:-** Non-teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Hospital staff:-** Hospital staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Punitive Action Summary (Punitive Policy 2026-27, approved in the 160th Board Meeting)**

| **Deficiency** | **Consequence** | **Seats** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Average attendance of patients in OPD per day: 10.00% deficiency | Seat reduction | 1 |
| Computerized central registration system | Seat reduction | 1 |

Cumulative seat reduction of **2 seats** (2% of the sanctioned intake of 100).
